stemHtml: Concerning the relationship between performance and stress, which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: A well-trained pilot is able to eliminate any kind of stress completely when he/she is scheduled to fly.
options.b: A student will learn faster and better under severe stress.
options.c: A moderate level of stress may improve performance.
options.d: Domestic stress will not affect the pilot’s performance because he/she is able to leave this type of stress on the ground.
